title: utricularia beaugleholei subsp. beaugleholei
intro: Utricularia beaugleholei subsp. beaugleholei is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the bladderwort family (Utriculariaceae), found in Australia, specifically in Tasmania. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Utricularia beaugleholei subsp. beaugleholei include its ability to aid in reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are sometimes used in topical applications for skin conditions and wound healing.
